mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auto_invest_stocks (user_id, account_id, stock_code, market, period, period_day, amount_type, buy_amount, buy_quantity, currency, is_active) VALUES (#{userId}, #{accountId}, #{stockCode}, #{market}, #{period}, #{periodDay}, #{amountType}, #{buyAmount}, #{buyQuantity}, #{currency}, #{isActive})
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.account_id, a.stock_code, a.market, a.period, a.period_day, a.amount_type, a.buy_amount, a.buy_quantity, a.currency, a.is_active, a.created_at, a.updated_at, s.stock_name FROM auto_invest_stocks a LEFT JOIN tradable_stocks s ON s.stock_code = a.stock_code WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.id DESC

SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.account_id, a.stock_code, a.market, a.period, a.period_day, a.amount_type, a.buy_amount, a.buy_quantity, a.currency, a.is_active, a.created_at, a.updated_at, s.stock_name FROM auto_invest_stocks a LEFT JOIN tradable_stocks s ON s.stock_code = a.stock_code WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE auto_invest_stocks SET period = #{period}, period_day = #{periodDay}, amount_type = #{amountType}, buy_amount = #{buyAmount}, buy_quantity = #{buyQuantity}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM auto_invest_stocks WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
